items.title: Pele and Maradona would’ve argued over his greatness, but Lionel Messi’s final World Cup has left no room for doubt
items.summary: Messi's tearful 2026 World Cup farewell revives the Pele-Maradona debate, but leaves his place beside football's greatest legends beyond any doubt forever.

items.title: Hridoy pleased with T20I series win despite 'injuries and limited options'
items.summary: Bangladesh were without Mustafizur Rahman and Shoriful Islam for the entire series, and lost Nahid Rana for the decider, which they won by four wickets
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
